title: LS9 0PJ, Yorkshire Water Service Limited: permit partial surrender issued - EPR/FB3809MM/S004
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and surrender letter for:   Operator name: Yorkshire Water Service Limited Installation name: Knostrop Sludge Treatment and Tankered Waste Facility Permit number: EPR/FB3809MM  "
